stemHtml: Typically a hydraulic pressure indicator uses which of the following sensors.

options.a: a diaphragm that receives a hydraulic signal from the accumulator.
options.b: a transducer in a remote location which generates an electrical signal.
options.c: a bellows that receives a mechanical signal from a Bourdon tube.
options.d: an aneroid capsule that receives a pneumatic signal from the hydraulic reservoir.
